description: Set frequency of updates during cycling.

keywords.name: common-plane
keywords.description: Set common-plane location to update every i cycles. (The default is 10 .)

keywords.name: subcontact
keywords.description: Set searches for new sub-contacts to occur every i cycles. (The default is 100 .).

keywords.name: face-normal
keywords.description: Set face normal to update every i cycles (The default is every 10 cycles.)
